Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 11249 0 0}So, this is just my personal opinion...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 0 -1 -1 0 0}But I think that all our lives are predestined.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 0 -1 -1 0 0}If unexpected events in life are actually course corrections from whoever decides our destinies...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 0 -1 -1 0 0}Then our lives can be described as scenarios written by an author.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 11228 0 0}But I don't mean that pessimistically.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 0 -1 -1 0 0}Even if your life is predestined, I think you should give it your all while on that path.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 11234 0 0}{f 5 13 11 30 108}Y-You agree? Well, I'm glad I decided to talk to you about this.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 0 108 0 25 25}I was worried that I'd sound too preachy about it, but...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 0 -1 -1 0 0}If I only met you because I was written to, then I'd like to thank the author of my life.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Hiraga seems very happy.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I feel like we became a lot closer today.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 11252 0 0}I know it's not a philosophy that everyone will agree with, but... Don't get the wrong idea.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 0 108 2 25 25}It doesn't mean that I'm giving up. In fact, I'm more motivated than ever before![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 0 108 3 25 25}A-Anyway, let's just drop it. I shouldn't push my opinions on you like that...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Hiraga has fallen silent.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I feel like we didn't get any closer today...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 11226 0 0}{f 5 13 11 15 108}Hm... Maybe. But think about it. When you come to a crossroads, you have to make a decision.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 0 -1 -1 0 0}And if what decision you make has already been written before you even make it...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 0 -1 -1 0 0}...A-Actually, let's just drop it. This conversation is getting way too complicated.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Hiraga is smiling bashfully.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I learned a little more about him today.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 11251 0 0}Well, I have to continue my preparations. I think I'll check for some books on the way back.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 0 -1 -1 0 0}Oh, if you need help with your studies, feel free to ask. I can teach you my studying techniques.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The two of us talked for a while longer[n]before I headed back to the dorm.[n]{f 1 1}
